ref: I will give you a lot of descendants, and they will become great nations. Some of them will even be kings.
text: MeeŇč shin n…õ fo mbia e wora keshi n…õ efuli damtaana n…õ bewuraana e shi bumo to n lar.
translated: When I went and told him, he said that he would come but the chief and the elders said he should not go there.

ref: The land where he camped was owned by the descendants of Hamor, the father of Shechem. So Jacob paid them
text: Gbiti be ndarbi kalfa n…õ Jeek…Ēb daŇč ta n t…Ē kasawule n…õ e chena so na ashi Hamar be mbia kut…Ē. Hamar ere e daa la Sh…õk…õm mo tuto na.
translated: The man from the east had a farm near Jacob's village and he used to buy cassava from him but Hamar had killed his (the man's) son at Shechem.

ref: If a wild animal killed one of your sheep or goats, I paid for it myself. In fact, you demanded the full price, whether the animal was killed during the day or at night.
text: Ma al…õ maŇč naŇč ta kus…Ēb…Ēya jiŇčka kama n…õ kupuŇč to be kus…Ēb…Ēya kama p…õ n ji Ňč ka m bar fo. Kekama gba n…õ k daŇč wu, ma e daŇč ta kumo be kuk…Ē. Fo al…õ be kus…Ēb…Ēya kama n…õ b daŇč yuri kapaso Ňčko kany…õso fo daa shin nna n…õ mee ka loŇč be kus…Ēb…Ēya na be kuk…Ē.
translated: If we the youth do not take care of our culture, it will vanish and our culture will be lost and we will be like strangers in our own land. Even if we are educated, we should not forget our roots because our roots are our identity. We the youth should take care of our culture so that we can know our origin and our identity will not be lost.

ref: and replied, ‚ÄúIf you are willing to let me bury my wife here, please ask Zohar's son Ephron
text: Ňč kaŇč…õ bumo le: ‚ÄúTo, n…õ men shuli fan…õ m baa puli ma basa nfe bre, kumo ere men jande, men kule Zohar pibiny…õn Efr…Ēn n sa ma
translated: And the king said: ‚ÄúTake, and let your brother sit on my horse and wear my clothes, and put a crown on his head, and bring him on my second horse, and let them proclaim before him, saying, this is your brother, the one who will reign after me‚ÄĚ

ref: So the servant gave Abraham his word that he would do everything he had been told to do.
text: Eebraham ka malga le n loge na n…õ mbe kay…õrbi na ta en…Ē n w…Ēt…Ē mo ny…õnpe Eebraham be kebembi be kaseto m b…Ē ntaŇč n sa mo a y…Ē kesheŇč na be kapl…õa so.
translated: Abraham had many sheep and goats and cattle, and a large household, and the Philistines had stopped up all the wells that his father had dug, and they had filled them with earth.
